title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete AI video generation pipeline using Claude Code that automates planning, scripting, voiceover, visuals, music, and editing in a single command. The workflow leverages Archon as the orchestration engine, HyperFrames for video generation, and integrates services like Neon for backend infrastructure.
